# Chapter 3: Stress and strain  (~120 pp)
- 3.1 Internal forces become stresses (12) · 3.2 Normal and shear stress (15) · 3.3 Strain: small deformation theory (12) · 3.4 Hooke's law and elastic constants (12) · 3.5 Stress transformation, Mohr's circle (15) · 3.6 Yield and failure criteria (Tresca, von Mises) (15) · 3.7 Material non-linearity, plasticity preview (12) · 3.8 Stress concentration (12) · 3.9 Failure section: where parts actually break and why (15)

**Archetype**: stability, failure. **Project**: instrument a cantilever beam; measure strain at three locations; compare to theory. **Exercises**: 40.
